1: And thy righteousness unto the king's son.
3: And the little hills, by righteousness.
4: And shall break in pieces the oppressor.
6: As showers that that water the earth.
7: And abundance of peace so long as the moon endureth.
8: And from the river unto the ends of the earth.
9: And his enemies shall lick the dust.
10: The kings of Sheba and Seba shall offer gifts.
12: The poor also, and him him that hath no helper.
13: And shall save the souls of the needy.
14: And precious shall their blood be in his sight.
15: Prayer also shall be made for him continually; and and daily shall he be praised.
16: The fruit thereof shall shake like Lebanon: And they they of the city shall flourish like grass of the earth.
17: And men men shall be blessed in him: All nations shall call him blessed.
19: And let the whole earth be filled with with his glory; Amen, and Amen.
20: The prayers of David the son of Jesse are ended.
